name: meshy-prompt-studio
description: Codex plugin for safe Meshy setup, dry-run planning, asset packs, and recovery-aware follow-up workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, test, generate, and recover Meshy asset workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Meshy Prompt Studio helps Codex guide safe first runs with print-tools, test mode, and dry-run planning before paid Meshy work. It also supports Text to 3D asset packs, Image to 3D and multi-image workflows, texture and retexture follow-ups, recovery-aware history inspection, downloads, rigging, animation, and local packaging.
defaultPrompt: Run the safe first-run check with print-tools, test mode, then dry-run.
Plan a low-poly prop asset pack and show estimated credits before spend.
If I ask for texture after a generated model, treat it as a follow-up on that asset.
